name: ai-scholar
description: Learn a subject deeply, curate an evidence-led OKF knowledge base, and design a human-approved Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Research subjects into approved, evidence-led plugins.
interface.longDescription: Collect, deduplicate, prioritize, and curate sources into an auditable OKF knowledge base; then design, review, implement, and validate a Codex plugin.
interface.defaultPrompt: Study this subject deeply, curate an evidence-led OKF knowledge base, and present a Codex plugin design for my approval.
